Therefore, Mundi's birth must have occurred sixty years before 33 BBY, in [[93 BBY]]. As Droe is stated in ''[[Vow of Justice]]'' to be Ki-Adi-Mundi's elder sister, she must have been born sometime prior to 93 BBY.</ref>

'''Droe''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] and the older sister of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]].

==History==
===Early life===
Droe was born on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]]<ref name="Vow of Justice" /> sometime before [[95 BBY]]<ref name="Birth Date" /> to a [[Ki-Adi-Mundi's mother|mother]] and [[Ki-Adi-Mundi's father|father]]. [[Gender/Legends|She]] had several sisters and one younger brother. <ref name="Vow of Justice" />

===Hiding from raiders===
She was present when [[The Dark Woman|An'ya Kuro]] arrived on [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]] intending to take her younger brother to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. When Kuro's [[Starship/Legends|starship]] landed on the [[Mundi family|Mundi family's]] [[Farm/Legends|farm]], Droe and her sisters fled in fear of the strange machinery. Later that day, her brother [[Life Detection|sensed]] a group of raiders, led by [[Bin-Garda-Zon]], approaching the farm. Droe stayed with Ki-Adi in a hidden cellar underneath the house. When their father was struck by Zon, Droe, though worried herself, managed to cover her brother's mouth with her hand, preventing him from making any sound and giving away their location to the raiders. Soon after, the door to the cellar opened, and the two were allowed out by their mother.<ref name="Vow of Justice" />

===Death===
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], she, along with the rest of her family on Cerea, were killed during a [[Battle of Cerea|devastating battle]] on Cerea<ref name="Republic 62" /> between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="Alien Species">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref>
